title: Raptor's Camo Creepers
description: Adds Camouflauged Creepers into your world
body:
## Resource Pack Features
- **Creepers that camoflauge using foliage (Like how it was intended)**
- **Emissive textures**
- **A custom model**
- **Contains textures for The End and The Nether**
- **Supports Biomes O' Plenty**

> Check It Out On Curseforge: [Curseforge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/raptors-camo-creepers)
